proof: function(x0: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { gcd_step_n(x0, num_gcd_steps(x0)).second = Nat.0 }(Pair.new(a, b))
function(x0: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { gcd_step_n(x0, num_gcd_steps(x0)).first = gcd_pair(x0) }(Pair.new(a, b))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { gcd_pair(Pair.new(x0, x1)) = x0.gcd(x1) }(a, b)
gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), n).first != gcd_pair(Pair.new(a, b))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = x1.gcd(x0) }(b, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(b, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0.divides(x1) or not x0.divides(x2) or x0.divides(x1.gcd(x2)) }(d, a, b)
d.divides(b)
d.divides(a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x0) }(a, b)

function(x0: Nat) { not (gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).second = Nat.0 and a.gcd(b) = gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).first and a.gcd(b).divides(a) and a.gcd(b).divides(b) and forall(x1: Nat) { not x1.divides(a) or not x1.divides(b) or x1.divides(a.gcd(b)) }) }(n)

function(x0: Nat) { not (gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).second = Nat.0 and a.gcd(b) = gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).first and a.gcd(b).divides(a) and a.gcd(b).divides(b)) or not forall(x1: Nat) { not x1.divides(a) or not x1.divides(b) or x1.divides(a.gcd(b)) } }(n)

function(x0: Nat) { not (gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).second = Nat.0 and a.gcd(b) = gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).first and a.gcd(b).divides(a)) or not forall(x1: Nat) { not x1.divides(a) or not x1.divides(b) or x1.divides(a.gcd(b)) } }(n)

function(x0: Nat) { not (gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).second = Nat.0 and a.gcd(b) = gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).first) or not forall(x1: Nat) { not x1.divides(a) or not x1.divides(b) or x1.divides(a.gcd(b)) } }(n)

function(x0: Nat) { not forall(x1: Nat) { not x1.divides(a) or not x1.divides(b) or x1.divides(a.gcd(b)) } or gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).second != Nat.0 or gcd_step_n(Pair.new(a, b), x0).first != a.gcd(b) }(n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { w0.divides(a) and w0.divides(b) and not w0.divides(a.gcd(b)) }
function(x0: Nat) { not x0.divides(b) or not x0.divides(a) or x0.divides(a.gcd(b)) }(w0)
w0.divides(a) and w0.divides(b) and not w0.divides(a.gcd(b))
w0.divides(b)
w0.divides(a)
not w0.divides(a)
